hero.name: Anaelle Mathe
hero.tagline: Crafting digital experiences with clean code and bold design.

about.title: About Me
about.bio: Software engineering student at Polytechnique Montréal, currently finishing my second year with distinction after a preparatory year and a baccalauréat mention très bien from Lycée Saint-Paul d'Angoulême. From July 2026, I'll be on exchange at the University of Technology Sydney.
about.bio2: What truly interests me is the intersection of technical rigor and creative sensibility. I believe great products are born from that balance: clean code and design that makes sense.
about.bio3: Beyond code, I love art, the humanities, music, and dance. It's that mix that shapes how I approach problems: with curiosity, method, and a strong sense of aesthetics.

code.label: Clean code
code.desc: Readable, tested, maintainable — code is read more than written.

design.label: Thoughtful design
design.desc: Every pixel and interaction should have intent.

human.label: Human-first
human.desc: Tech serves people, not the other way around.

campuslift.title: CampusLift
campuslift.description: Student crowdfunding platform — creators publish campus initiatives, collect micro-pledges, and engage through threaded discussions with Stripe payments and live notifications.
campuslift.tagline: Crowdfunding platform empowering student-led campus initiatives

pankration.title: Pankration
pankration.description: Full-stack web application built as part of a university project at Polytechnique Montréal, exploring modern full-stack concepts.

robot.title: Autonomous Robot — INF1900
robot.description: Programmed an autonomous robot to navigate a black-line circuit, avoid obstacles, and return to its starting position — using an ATmega324PA AVR microcontroller and state machine logic.
robot.tagline: Embedded autonomous robot with line tracking and obstacle avoidance

beyond.label: 05. beyond

beyond.subtitle: Code is only part of who I am

eai.title: E-AI — Volunteering
eai.desc: Student association linking ethics and AI — active member and volunteer.

datathon.title: Finance Datathon 2025
datathon.desc: Participant in a financial data analysis hackathon.

art.title: Art & humanities
art.desc: Curiosity for visual arts and the humanities — a constant source of inspiration.

music.title: Drums & Piano
music.desc: Musician who loves playing drums and piano. The rigor of rhythm feeds the rigor of code.

dance.title: Dance
